folio.label: 71v
folio.l: Thow seist rigút as wormes , shenden a tree
Rigút so a wyf , destroyetú hire husbonde
This knowen they , that ben to wyues bonde
Lordynges rigút thus , as ©e han vnderstonde
Bar I stifly , myne olde husbondes on honde
That thus they seiden , in here dronkenesse
And al was fals , but that I tok wytnesse
On Iankyn , and on my nece also
O lord the peyne , I dide hem and the woo
Ful giltlees , by goddes swete pyne
For as an hors , I coude byte and whyne
I coude pleyne , and I was in the gilt

note.notetxt: 387There is a cross in dry point in the left margin, it takes 4-5 lines.ODR

folio.l: Or elles often tyme , I had ben spilt
Who so that first cometú to the mylle , first he grynt
I pleyned first , so was oure werre I stynt
They weren ful glad , to excuse hem ful blife
Of thyngö , of whiche , they gilten neuäe in here lyue
Of wenches wold I beren hem on honde
Whan that for seke , they mygút vnethes stonde
ñet tikeled I his hert , for that he
Wende , that I of hi~ had , so gret chierte
I swor that al my walkyngö , out be nygút

note.notetxt: 397There is a cross in dry point in the left margin, it takes 12 lines.ODR

folio.l: Was for to aspien , wenches that he digút
Vnder that colour , had I many a myrthe
For al swicú wyt , is ©euen vs in oure birthe
Disceite , wepyngö , spynnyngö , god hath ©euen
To wommen kyndely , while that they moun lyuen
And thus of on thyngö , I auaunt me
At the ende , I had the beter , in icú degree
Be sleigút or force , or sum manä thyngö
As by contenuel murmur , and grucchyng
Namely a bedde , there had they myschaunce
There wold I chide , and do hem no plesaunce
I wold no lengere , in the bed a byde
If that I felt , his arme al ouer my syde
Til that he had mad , his raunsouö vn to me
Than wold I suffren hi~ , to doon his nycete
And æäfore to euäy man , this tale I telle
Wynne who so may , for aÂ is for to selle
Witú empty hond , men mounö noone haukes lure
For wynnynge wold I , al his lust endure
And make me , a feyned appetit´
And ©et in bacou~ , had I neuäe delit´
That made me , æ euäe , I wold hem chide

note.notetxt: 419This folio is extremely dirty. This is the last paper folio of the quire.ODR
